steps.t: Tibira has asked you to take her copper ingot to Dashên at Iridír in Ambarûl and trade it for fresh produce.
Tibira has asked you to take her copper ingot to Dashên at Iridír in Ambarûl and trade it for fresh produce. You should talk to Dashên.
You have traded Tibira's copper ingot to Dashên at Iridír in Ambarûl for fresh produce. You should return to Tibira at Western Khanâg in Khûd Zagin wi…
